parsed.production_notes: The video features real human actors in a natural indoor apartment setting. Lighting, movements, and camera handling are authentic and typical of user-generated content.

characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, fair complexion, long dark hair. Expressive facial features.
characters.wardrobe: Alternates between a white fluffy sweater with a black skirt, and a blue short-sleeved button-down top.

characters.appearance: Young adult male, slim build, fair complexion, short dark hair. Wears glasses.
characters.wardrobe: Wears a white pilot shirt with epaulets and a black tie initially, then a dark grey t-shirt.

characters.appearance: 3D animated male character with dark hair and stylized features.
characters.wardrobe: White pilot shirt with epaulets and a black tie.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B are standing close together against a plain white wall. Character A is holding Character B's arm playfully and looking up at him. Character B is smiling. Character A wears a white fluffy sweater and Character B wears a pilot uniform.

scenes.visual_description: Character A playfully holds Character B's arm. Text overlays introduce the video's premise.
scenes.on_screen_text: 싱가포르 백수의 남편 비행 데려가달라고 조르기 (Begging my husband to take me on his flight as a jobless person in Singapore)

scenes.setting: Living room with a white sofa, yellow patterned pillow, and a floor lamp.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on a white sofa, holding a beige crescent-shaped pillow. She wears a blue short-sleeved top and looks directly at the camera with a determined expression. In the background, Character B sits at a white desk, looking at a silver laptop. He wears a dark grey t-shirt and glasses.

scenes.visual_description: Character A speaks to the camera while sitting on a sofa. Character B works on a laptop in the background. Captions appear as she speaks, and an inset image of Amsterdam is briefly shown.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 여러분 제 남편 암스테르담 비행있어요 [Everyone, my husband has a flight to Amsterdam.]
Character A says: 저번주에 호주 비행 따라갔지만 [I followed him on his flight to Australia last week, but]
Character A says: 암스테르담도 따라가고 싶어요 [I want to follow him to Amsterdam too.]
Character A says: 타겟 저기 있어요 [The target is over there.]
Character A says: 전혀 쉽지 않아보여요 [He doesn't look easy at all.]
Character A says: 그래도 나 물러서지 않을거에요.. [But I won't back down..]
Character A says: 암스테르담 한번도 안가봤단말이에요 [I've never been to Amsterdam.]
scenes.on_screen_text:

저번주에 호주 비행 따라갔지만 (I followed him on his flight to Australia last week, but)
암스테르담도 따라가고 싶어요 (I want to follow him to Amsterdam too)
타겟 저기 있어요 (The target is over there)
전혀 쉽지 않아보여요 (He doesn't look easy at all)

scenes.setting: Living room with a white sofa, yellow patterned pillow, and a floor lamp.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits on the white sofa, holding a pink smartphone in her hands. She looks intently at the screen. She wears a blue short-sleeved top. The background shows a white wall, a floor lamp, and a yellow patterned pillow. Her expression is focused.

scenes.visual_description: Character A interacts with her smartphone. The video frequently cuts to screen recordings of a language learning app featuring a 3D animated pilot avatar. Captions and app UI elements are visible.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 얼른 스픽앱 켜줘요 [Quickly turn on the Speak app.]
Character A says: 남편에게 비행 데려가달라고 부탁하는 상황으로 [In a situation where I ask my husband to take me on his flight]
Character A says: 롤플레이 만들어요 [I'll create a roleplay.]
Character C says: You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along on the flight? [You know, darling, flying with me is not as simple as it sounds—it involves a lot of rules and safety checks. What makes you want to come along on the flight?]
Character A says: AI주제에 진짜같고 강경하네요?! [For an AI, it's so real and stubborn?!]
Character A says: 나 지지않을거에요 [I won't lose.]
Character A says: 열심히 스파르타로 싸워줘요 [Fight me hard like a Spartan.]
Character A says: 타겟이 관심가져요 [The target is showing interest.]
Character A says: 신경안쓰고 계속 프리톡해요 [I'll ignore him and keep free-talking.]
Character A says: 와우! 틀리니까 바로바로 고쳐줘요 [Wow! It corrects me immediately when I'm wrong.]
Character A says: 저를 강하게 키워줘요 [It trains me strong.]
Character A says: 제가 암스테르담가서 감자튀김 먹고싶다니까 [I said I want to go to Amsterdam and eat french fries]
Character C says: Definitely! "Vleminckx" is one of the most beloved fries stands in Amsterdam, known for its [Definitely! "Vleminckx" is one of the most beloved fries stands in Amsterdam, known for its]
Character A says: 제 AI남편이 감튀맛집 추천해줬어요 [My AI husband recommended a good french fry place.]
Character A says: 기술력 뭐에요? [What is this technology?]
Character A says: 냅다 구글맵 켜서 저장해요 [I immediately open Google Maps and save it.]
Character A says: 내친김에 여행지 추천해달라해요 [While I'm at it, I ask for travel destination recommendations.]
Character C says: Of course! Amsterdam offers charming canals, the Van Gogh Museum, and the Anne Frank House, which many find deeply moving. Are you more interested in art, history, or simply enjo [Of course! Amsterdam offers charming canals, the Van Gogh Museum, and the Anne Frank House, which many find deeply moving. Are you more interested in art, history, or simply enjo]
Character A says: 와 여행계획까지..? [Wow, even travel plans..?]
Character A says: 역시 세계최고기술 보유한 스픽.. [As expected from Speak, which has the world's best technology..]
scenes.on_screen_text:
얼른 스픽앱 켜줘요 (Quickly turn on the Speak app.)
남편에게 비행 데려가달라고 부탁하는 상황으로 롤플레이 만들어요 (I'll create a roleplay situation where I ask my husband to take me on his flight)
AI주제에 진짜같고 강경하네요?! (For an AI, it's so real and stubborn?!)
나 지지않을거에요 열심히 스파르타로 싸워줘요 (I won't lose. Fight me hard like a Spartan.)
타겟이 관심가져요 신경안쓰고 계속 프리톡해요 (The target is showing interest. I'll ignore him and keep free-talking.)
와우! 틀리니까 바로바로 고쳐줘요 저를 강하게 키워줘요 (Wow! It corrects me immediately when I'm wrong. It trains me strong.)
제가 암스테르담가서 감자튀김 먹고싶다니까 (I said I want to go to Amsterdam and eat french fries)
제 AI남편이 감튀맛집 추천해줬어요 기술력 뭐에요? (My AI husband recommended a good french fry place. What is this technology?)
냅다 구글맵 켜서 저장해요 (I immediately open Google Maps and save it.)
내친김에 여행지 추천해달라해요 (While I'm at it, I ask for travel destination recommendations.)
와 여행계획까지..? 역시 세계최고기술 보유한 스픽.. (Wow, even travel plans..? As expected from Speak, which has the world's best technology..)

scenes.setting: Kitchen area with white cabinets and a black refrigerator.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A and Character B stand in a kitchen. Character A is in the foreground, looking at the camera and speaking, wearing a blue top. Character B is slightly behind her to the left, wearing a dark grey t-shirt and glasses, looking at Character A. The background features white kitchen cabinets and a black refrigerator.

scenes.visual_description: Character A approaches Character B in the kitchen. They converse in English, with Character A speaking confidently. Captions translate their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: 저 준비됐어요 타겟 어프로치! [I'm ready, approaching the target!]
Character A says: I want to ask you something. [I want to ask you something.]
Character B says: 응. [Yeah.]
Character A says: Can I follow your flight?? [Can I follow your flight??]
Character B says: Oh, why do you want to come on my flight? [Oh, why do you want to come on my flight?]
Character A says: Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you. [Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you.]
Character B says: Okay. [Okay.]
Character A says: 뭐야 쉽자나요! [What, it's so easy!]
scenes.on_screen_text:
저 준비됐어요 타겟 어프로치! (I'm ready, approaching the target!)
나 물어볼거있어 (I want to ask you something)
나 비행따라가도돼?? (Can I follow your flight??)
왜 내 비행 따라오고싶은데? (Oh, why do you want to come on my flight?)
왜냐면 새해 첫 레이오버비행이구 함께 의미 있는 시간을 보내고 싶어 (Because it's the first layover of this year and I want to spend quality time with you)
뭐야 쉽자나요! (What, it's so easy!)

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A smiles brightly at the camera, holding a green passport and a boarding pass near her face. She wears a white fluffy sweater. The background is dark and slightly blurred.

scenes.visual_description: Character A happily shows her passport and boarding pass. The video then transitions to a shot from an airplane window at night showing city lights. Promotional text overlays are present.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: 여러분 지금 스픽 기간한정 최저가할인 행사하니까 캡션 참고해주세요!! [Everyone, Speak is having a limited-time lowest price discount event right now, so please check the caption!!]
scenes.on_screen_text: 여러분 지금 스픽 기간한정 최저가할인 행사하니까 캡션 참고해주세요!! (Everyone, Speak is having a limited-time lowest price discount event right now, so please check the caption!!)
